title: oenothera contorta var. flexuosa
intro: Oenothera contorta var. flexuosa, also known as twisted evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Onagraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oenothera contorta var. flexuosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems.
